frame_analyses.description: Orange background, no instruments visible yet
Instruments visible with suture and needle. Text shows 'Base - Correct place for suturing movements'
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good setup with proper instrument positioning

frame_analyses.description: Text shows 'Supinate and grab'. Instruments positioned for knot tying
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Beginning knot tying sequence with proper supination technique

frame_analyses.description: Text shows 'Alternate instruments'. Continuing knot formation
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrating instrument alternation during knot tying

frame_analyses.description: Instruments working with suture loops visible around the orange Penrose drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Active knot formation with multiple loops suggesting surgeon's knot

frame_analyses.description: Text shows 'Wrong traction'. Knot tightening in progress
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Educational note about proper traction technique during knot securing

frame_analyses.description: Suture visible through both marks on drain, knot being secured
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good suture placement through target marks

frame_analyses.description: Beginning second throw with hand switching
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper hand switching between throws as required

frame_analyses.description: Final throw being completed with continued hand alternation
Final position showing completed knot on drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task appears complete with secure knot

knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double throw as first throw
Correct single throw with proper hand switching
Final single throw with continued hand alternation

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit appears well closed with no visible gaps

technique_summary: This appears to be an educational demonstration video showing proper FLS Task 5 technique with appropriate surgeon's knot followed by single throws with hand switching.
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise suture placement to minimize deviation from marks
Ensure consistent traction during knot tightening
